params.name: Pandora's Box
params.source: Grandmaster Scrolls (1%), Lottery Machine (0.12%), Relic Forge (100 Relic RF), Soul Chest(1%), Wishing (0.11%)
params.description:
On Jun 8, 1600 BC, Pandora's Box was opened and brought a calamity to the world. On this day, Zeus gave Pandora a sealed treasure box studded with precious gems. Besides, the gods also gave Pandora an insatiable curiosity. Unable to restrain herself, she opened the box and unleashed disease, disaster, and war into the world, which forever disrupted the peace of humanity.

[The most famous Pandora's Box in history]

In the 11th century, General Hong released 108 demons. In the 14th century, Mongo …
